creator.title: Data Analyst
creator.description: Turning data to insights to drive informed decisions and strategies

description: Enhanced and ensured HIPAA compliance by refactoring core backend services, adding robust authentication techniques, maintaining audit-controls and enforcing strict data handling.
Developed robust backend integrations with external service providers, increasing system reliability and reducing human errors in workflow execution.

Developed an API-Platform as an internal tool to help streamline onboarding, development, and debugging by employing OpenAPI and SwaggerUI for aggregation, also integrated with CI/CD pipeline to ensure annotation of APIs match functionality at all times.
Contributed to several AI initiatives aimed at automating clinical workflows, including prescription digitization that cut manual entry time by 56%.
Developed KITT, an Integration Toolkit to streamline database migration from external systems, automating data manipulation and dependency handling and reducing client onboarding time by over 90%.
Designed and implemented automation routines for recurring operational tasks, including automated reporting, data validation checks, and workflow triggers.

Created multi-agent systems to automate marketing, lead generation, and email responses, integrating AI through models hosted on bare-metal servers and APIs using different technologies like Node.js and FastAPI, reducing employee preparation time by 43% and boosting lead conversion rate by 23%.
Developed a Machine Learning model using image segmentation for a projection mapping application, reducing the cost of projection mapping projects, and the project preparation time, by about 50%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams by documenting workflow requirements, coordinating between technical and business stakeholders, and ensuring smooth delivery of integration-related features.

Developed Power BI dashboards for real-time client behavior analysis, including churn indicators, engagement trends, and A/B test performance; transformed raw operational data into actionable insights that informed marketing strategy and optimized user retention efforts.
Worked on the SimplyBook team as a team lead, employed agile methodologies, and was able to launch the first SimplyBook version in about 3 months.

Designed a proprietary e-Commerce platform with a comprehensive management dashboard, support for selling various digital products, a CRM dashboard, and user management, driving increased site traffic and sales.
Leveraged eCommerce expertise to optimize marketing tools, enhancing client engagement and market reach.
Deployed and oversaw the implementation of a sales system with advanced features for accounting, employee management, and product management, adopted by multiple local SMBs.
Managed end-to-end project lifecycles and ensured timely delivery.

Worked within a team of 5 to develop a Computer Vision Poll System for the Palestinian Engineers Association, achieving 100% accuracy across 5 trials, and ensuring robustness in Real-World environments.
